smoothscrolling.configuration.chat.toolt: Configure chat scrolling and opening animations
smoothscrolling.configuration.enableMask:
Enables visual debugging for scroll masking regions.
Useful for development and troubleshooting
Configure scrolling for server lists, resource pack lists, and other entry lists
smoothscrolling.configuration.hotbar.too: Configure hotbar scrolling behavior and animations
smoothscrolling.configuration.openingSmo:
Controls the smoothness of the chat opening animation.
0 = No animation (instant)
1 = Maximum smoothness (slowest)
smoothscrolling.configuration.rollover.t: When enabled, scrolling past slot 9 wraps to slot 1 and vice versa
smoothscrolling.configuration.smoothness:
Controls animation smoothness.
0 = No animation (instant)
1 = Maximum smoothness (slowest)
smoothscrolling.configuration.speed.tool:
Scroll speed in pixels per scroll event.
0 = Auto (uses vanilla speed)
Max = 100 pixels
smoothscrolling.configuration.title: %s Configuration
